original_prompt: 给这个一套首饰做一张亚马逊主图，要求一个欧洲男士捧着这套首饰给一个女生惊喜。
optimized_prompt:
[
  {
    "nano_banana_en": "[Visual Description]
Subject Lock: The silver crystal jewelry set (tiara, necklace, and earrings) prominently displayed in a luxurious gift box being held open.
Scene: A romantic indoor evening setting, soft warm lighting. A handsome European man in a semi-formal shirt is holding the open jewelry box towards the camera/viewer, slightly out of focus in the background is a surprised and happy European woman covering her mouth with joy. The focus is sharp on the jewelry set in the foreground.
Atmosphere: Romantic, high-end, emotional, surprise moment, cinematic lighting, bokeh background.

[Text & UI Layout]
Platform: Amazon
Main Title: "The Perfect Surprise"
Sub Title: "Complete Bridal Set"
Badge/Tag: "Premium Quality"
Font Style: Elegant Serif font for the title, minimalist Sans-Serif for subtitles, white or gold text overlay.",
    "seadream_cn": "[视觉描述]
主体锁定：银色水晶首饰套装（皇冠、项链和耳环）作为绝对视觉焦点，陈列在一个打开的高级丝绒礼盒中。
场景：浪漫的求婚或周年纪念氛围。一位英俊的欧洲男士穿着半正式衬衫，双手捧着打开的首饰盒递向前方。背景中有一位欧洲女性，面带惊讶和幸福的表情，双手捂嘴，眼神充满感动。利用浅景深效果，主体首饰清晰锐利，人物背景虚化。
光影与色调：温暖的烛光色调，梦幻的光斑（Bokeh），强调珠宝的璀璨光泽。

[文字与UI布局]
平台：亚马逊 (Amazon)
主标题："The Perfect Surprise" (完美惊喜)
副标题："Complete Bridal Set" (全套新娘首饰)
标签："Premium Quality"
字体风格：高雅的衬线体主标题，搭配简洁的无衬线副标题，文字应避开珠宝主体，置于画面上方或下方留白处。",

Text should be minimal, English only (per Amazon rules), and placed in 'safe zones' (usually corners or top) to not cover the jewelry."
